name: cadence-vscode
description: Privacy-first activity and focused-time tracking for VS Code.

cadence.enabled.markdownDescription: Master switch for Cadence activity tracking. Takes effect on the next window reload.

cadence.agentPort.markdownDescription: Loopback port of the local Cadence daemon that events are POSTed to. Must match `CADENCE_AGENT_PORT`.

cadence.redactPaths.markdownDescription: When enabled, event titles carry only the file basename and project name — never an absolute path.

cadence.idleThresholdSec.markdownDescription: Seconds of no editor interaction before the current focus session is treated as idle. Matches the OS collector default (P1-A.2).
